creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
With pkg 1.7.99.10 there is still the error with linux ports:


[101i386-default-PR209382-job-10] Extracting linux_base-f10-10_9: ........ done
pkg-static: Fail to set time on /compat/linux/proc: Operation not supported

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/linux_base-f10-10_9.txz

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101i386-default-PR209382/2016-05-15_07h51m24s/logs/errors/linux-f10-expat-2.0.1_1.log
